package rulefixtures

// scenario for likely_n_squared_string_concat: Opt-in deeper semantic signal for repeated string concatenation inside nested loops without obvious builder usage.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: contextual.
type Rule613PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario613Positive(records []Rule613PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
